title: Grid Capacity Map DSO - Production and Consumption (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] **Replacing [GridCapacityMapDSO](https://energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/GridCapacityMapDSO)** 

The dataset is the quarterly dataset that describes the grid capacity at the DSO level, capacity at the general level, and for wind and solar production units.


Data is related to [www.kapacitetskort.dk](https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/eb5b387e376f49b8996d5e7c47fbdd37).

***apc**: available production capacity* \
***acc**: available consumption capacity*\
***cap**: capacity* \
***cons**: consumption* \
***prod**:  production* \
***lb / ub**: lower / upper bound* \
***with_tso / no_tso**: transformer presence*
